requester.requester_label: Remote connector requested a session-scoped attach to the selected target.

authority_owner.source_label: Shell-owned remote attach review issues the session authority ticket.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: No policy lock blocks this remote attach; user choice controls the session.

target_scope.target_label: Selected remote workspace target; no full profile or future-session grant.
target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: Grant lasts for this attach session and expires on detach, trust drift, or policy epoch change.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: Remote status strip > Active attach grants shows detach and revoke actions.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Attach the IDE session to the selected remote workspace.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Open files and run remote-aware workspace services against the selected target.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Prepare remote task and terminal capability under the session envelope.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Allow explicit user-run task or terminal actions after attach.

prompt_questions.what_is_requested: Attach to the selected remote workspace for this session.
prompt_questions.why_needed: Remote file, terminal, and task surfaces need a target-bound session authority envelope.
prompt_questions.changes_if_allowed: The remote workspace becomes the active target until detach or revocation.
prompt_questions.works_if_denied: Local files, local search, recent work, and cached remote metadata remain available.
prompt_questions.grant_scope_statement: Grant is session-scoped and does not persist across future attach attempts.
prompt_questions.authority_owner_statement: The shell issues the session authority ticket after user approval.
prompt_questions.revocation_route: Use the remote status strip or command palette to detach or revoke the session grant.

side_effect_envelope.effect_summary: Creates a session-bound remote attach envelope for the selected target.

consequence_blocks.outcome_label: Remote workspace attaches for this session
consequence_blocks.description: Remote workspace becomes the active target and session controls appear in the status strip.
The remote target is not attached; local files, local search, and cached metadata stay available.
The session envelope expires or revokes, remote controls narrow, and local work remains open.

denial_or_degrade.deny_path_behavior_label: If denied, local workspace use continues and the remote target is not attached.
denial_or_degrade.recovery_or_escalation_action: Open remote attach details or retry attach after confirming target identity.
